results.name: Object-oriented design
results.evidence: MVC: model=true, view=true, controller=true; 1 interface(s) / 3 class(es); patterns seen: Strategy.
fixes: Program to interfaces: expose behavior through interfaces, keep concrete classes behind them.
Apply appropriate design patterns (Strategy/Command/Factory/Builder/Observer) where they reduce coupling.

results.name: Tests & coverage
results.evidence: 1 test file(s) for 4 source file(s) (ratio 0.25), 2 assertion(s), JUnit detected.
fixes: Raise test coverage: aim for a test class per non-trivial source class.
Add more assertions per test, including edge cases and failure paths.

results.name: Documentation & comments
results.evidence: Javadoc coverage ~100% (9 blocks / 9 public decls), README 329 bytes, 1 design/analysis doc(s).
fixes: Expand the README: overview, how to build/run, and a design overview.

results.name: Code style & cleanliness
results.evidence: 0 file(s) >400 lines, 0 very-long method body(ies), 1 debug print(s), 1 TODO/FIXME, 1 commented-out code line(s).
fixes: Remove debug prints / printStackTrace; use proper error handling or logging.
Resolve or remove TODO/FIXME/HACK markers before submission.
Delete commented-out code — version control is the history.

results.name: Correctness & build
results.evidence: Build file: pom.xml; 4 package declaration(s); src/ layout yes.

results.name: Abstraction & encapsulation
results.evidence: 1 interface(s), 0 abstract class(es); implementation details leak via prints.
fixes: Ensure no field is public; expose state through methods and keep representation private.
